name: ORNA Barkley Power Outage Response
description: Comprehensive playbook for responding to power outages affecting business operations

phases.description: The purpose of the Identification stage is to accurately determine the incident type, severity and perform immediate containment and escalation.

tasks.title: Confirm power outage
tasks.description: Verify power outage affecting building and operations

subtasks.content: Attempt to access building
Contact Evergy to confirm power outage and obtain estimated time to repair

tasks.title: Contact Evergy and determine extent and expected restoration time
tasks.content: Contact Evergy and determine extent and expected restoration time
tasks.description: Contact utility provider to get outage information and estimated restoration timeline

subtasks.content: Call Evergy at xxx-xxx-xxxx or check Evergy website to determine extent and expected restoration time.

tasks.title: Communicate status and effect of power outage
tasks.content: Inform team members and contractors of the problem and what it means to them.
tasks.description: Notify all staff about power outage and impact on operations
outcomes: The team knows about the power outage and how it affects them

subtasks.content: Send email to team about power outage

phases.description: The main objective of the Containment stage is to limit the impact of the incident promptly and as much as possible, preventing further damage to the organization's assets, business functions, individuals, and reputation.

tasks.title: Contact staff and arrange for home work
tasks.description: Enable remote work capabilities for affected employees
outcomes: All employees understand home work arrangements and are working

subtasks.content: Determine who needs to and is equipped for taking office based equipment in order to work from home.
Marshall equipment ready for pick up or transport.
If no indication of resolution within X hours, arrange for computer equipment pickup or transport.

tasks.title: Move PBX offsite if possible after X hours of downtime
tasks.content: Move PBX offsite if possible after X hours of downtime
tasks.description: Relocate phone system to alternate location if outage extends

subtasks.content: Move PBX offsite if possible after X hours of downtime

tasks.title: Communication
tasks.content: Communicate the situation to staff, external parties and public, as needed
tasks.description: Execute communication plan for power outage
outcomes: Contact all parties per the plan

subtasks.content: Contact all parties per the communication plan.

tasks.title: Remote Employee Access
tasks.description: Ensure all employees have proper remote access

subtasks.content: Notify remote employees of the access plan.
Implement remote access plan for all employees.

tasks.title: Monitor Evergy Outages
tasks.description: Continuously monitor utility provider for restoration updates
outcomes: Ongoing monitoring until outage is resolved

subtasks.content: Monitor the Evergy website for outages and restoration times and advise employees, as appropriate.

tasks.title: Financial institution contacts
tasks.content: Contact appropriate financial institutions of our outage, as needed.
tasks.description: Notify financial partners about service disruption

subtasks.content: Contact appropriate financial institutions of our outage, as needed.

tasks.title: Incoming call reconfiguration
tasks.content: Reconfigure our Sangoma trunks to point to an outside number where incoming calls will be handled.
tasks.description: Reroute incoming calls to backup number
outcomes: Incoming calls routed to answering destination

subtasks.content: Reconfigure our Sangoma trunks to point to an outside number where incoming calls will be handled.

tasks.title: Winter impacts
tasks.description: Address winter-specific impacts like frozen pipes and perishable food

subtasks.content: Drain pipes per guidance document
Move or dispose of all perishable food

tasks.title: Alternate power sources
tasks.content: Check neighboring building for possible power access and implement if possible.
tasks.description: Explore and implement alternate power options
outcomes: Alternate power sources explored and implemented if possible

subtasks.content: Check neighboring building for possible power access and implement if possible.

phases.description: The Eradication stage focuses on removing all traces of the threat (such as malware) from the affected assets, and ensuring that the root cause has been eliminated before the assets of affected business functions can be restored to normal.

tasks.title: Verify power restored
tasks.description: Confirm with utility that power has been restored

subtasks.content: Contact Evergy to verify power restored.

tasks.title: Communicate to Team Normal Status
tasks.content: Let team members and contractors know that normal power has been restored
tasks.description: Notify all staff that operations are returning to normal
outcomes: Team and contractors return to normal work routines

subtasks.content: Send email to team and contractors to return to normal work flow.

phases.description: The Recovery stage aims to restore the affected assets to their full business-as-usual operation in the shortest possible time frame, after eradicating all traces of the threat and verifying that the systems are clean.

tasks.title: Restore distributed office computer equipment
tasks.description: Collect and return equipment that was distributed for remote work
outcomes: Distributed computer equipment is returned and inventory updated

subtasks.content: Restore distributed office computer equipment and update inventory.

phases.description: The Lessons Learned stage's main goal is to compile all relevant information about the incident and extract lessons that can help with future incident response activity, typically within the two weeks time frame after the incident has been resolved.

tasks.title: Documentation of the incident and results
tasks.content: Documentation of the incident and results
tasks.description: Create comprehensive incident report and lessons learned document

subtasks.content: Documentation of the incident and results here:
